column1: # /Print Cancel — `/P C` from the top-level Print menu drops any
# active print session and returns to READY. Reuses the same
# session-teardown that `/PF Q` uses; the difference is /P C lives
# at the PRINT_MENU level so it works as an "I changed my mind"
# exit before any destination is chosen.
# Direct path: just exercise the Cancel action from PRINT_MENU.
